title: [Skyship, Cages]
description: Thick metal bars run floor-to-ceiling, sectioning off a majority of the area as the beginning of a giant prison cell-like cage stretching deeper into the ship.  An opening where the metal bars used to latch has been destroyed, with the gate for that piece resting alongside the opening, having been torn off its hinges by a shearing force that has left the metal warped and jagged.  Dried blood mixed with animal fur coats the floor, leading in all directions.
